title: Leather Bundles
description: Because the normal recipe just kind of sucks!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd47aed46e85d9fd928bca6b993d39de7702c71.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b384ebae02ed6274b9ae986bdc41ece892e871df.png)

### This is just a super small mod to improve the bundle recipe- it makes them a bit less balanced, but is just better in my opinion!

I always find myself unmotivated to craft a bundle due to how weird they are to get, what with the rabbit hides and everything, so I decided to fix that myself :)

It also means you don't have to turn on the datapack that adds bundles, so that's a plus as well!
If you turn on the experiment, it will still have the rabbit hide recipe active, but you don't need to use it even if you turn on the datapack!

### Please report any issues, however small, on the Github [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/bency-mods/Leather_Bundles/issues)!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b384ebae02ed6274b9ae986bdc41ece892e871df.png)
